title: Hollow Man
summary: A group of students at a remote Gothic boarding school become obsessed with a series of disturbing horror films after noticing the same expressionless background figure hidden inside each one, silently feeding them cryptic clues tied to the school’s dark past. As their investigation leads them through secret corridors, abandoned buildings, missing student cases, and a decades-old treasure hunt, they uncover a sinister cycle that has been repeating through generations and realise too late that one of them was never meant to leave.
